---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new bank, feature, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?

A description of the feature or improvement.

## Why?

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed approach

How you think this could work (optional). Code snippets welcome.

## Bank integration (if applicable)

If this is a new bank request, include:

- Bank name and code:
- Receipt URL format:
- Response type (PDF / HTML / JSON):
- Sample reference number:
- Does it require an account number or phone number?
